mapper.select: SELECT file_idx, board_idx, file_original_name, file_saved_name, file_path, file_size, file_type, file_regdate FROM board_file WHERE board_idx = #{board_idx} ORDER BY file_idx ASC

SELECT file_idx AS fileidx, board_idx AS boardidx, file_original_name AS fileoriginalname, file_saved_name AS filesavedname, file_path AS filepath, file_size AS filesize, file_type AS filetype, file_regdate AS fileregdate FROM board_file WHERE board_idx = #{board_idx} ORDER BY file_idx ASC FETCH FIRST 1 ROWS ONLY
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO board_file ( file_idx, board_idx, file_original_name, file_saved_name, file_path, file_size, file_type, file_regdate ) VALUES ( nextval('board_file_file_idx_seq'), #{board_idx}, #{file_original_name}, #{file_saved_name}, #{file_path}, #{file_size}, #{file_type}, NOW() )
